Kernel: https://www.kaggle.com/code/vtu5118/cifar-10-using-vgg16
Slug for API: vtu5118/cifar-10-using-vgg16

1) Create an API token on Kaggle (Account -> Create New API Token).
   Save the downloaded kaggle.json to ONE of:
     ~/.kaggle/kaggle.json
     ~/.config/kaggle/kaggle.json
   chmod 600 that file.

2) Pull the notebook (.ipynb + metadata) into this folder:
   conda activate VFLAIR
   kaggle kernels pull vtu5118/cifar-10-using-vgg16 -m -p /home/peng326/VFLAIR/external/kaggle-cifar10-vgg16

The `kaggle` CLI is already installed in the VFLAIR conda env.
Without kaggle.json, `kaggle kernels pull` will fail with an authentication error.
